name: tutur
description: Offline-first AI-agent skills for Indonesian writing and Indonesian regional-language work.

skills.name: tutur-humanizer
skills.summary: Humanize Indonesian writing across formal, professional, casual, slang, and sales contexts.

skills.name: tutur-korporat-profesi
skills.summary: Role-aware Indonesian corporate communication for sales, CS, admin, HRD, ops, finance, marketing, and leadership.

skills.name: tutur-jabodetabek-urban
skills.summary: Source-aware Jaksel, Jaktim, Bekasi, and neutral Jabodetabek urban styles without stereotyping.

skills.name: tutur-kedhaton-solo
skills.summary: Source-aware Keraton Solo / Surakarta Basa Kedhaton register.

skills.name: tutur-bagongan-jogja
skills.summary: Source-aware Keraton Jogja / Yogyakarta Basa Bagongan register.

skills.name: tutur-sunda

skills.summary: Source-aware Bahasa Jawa generation and review with speech-level and dialect handling.
